chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. No. 5553 of 2019 Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) Fresh Case. 1. For order on office objection No. 31. 2. For order on Misc. No. 24485/19. 3. For hearing of main case. ------------------ 18.10.2021 None is present for the petitioner. Same was the position on last date of hearing. It appears that after filing this petition, the petitioner has lost his interest in pursuing the same; therefore, the instant petition is dismissed for non- prosecution alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Athar Zai
